scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentic/shared && npm run build -w @agentic/skill-agents && npm run build -w @agentic/jsbridge && npm run build -w @agentic/server && npm run build -w @agentic/ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agentic/shared && npm run build -w @agentic/shared && npm run typecheck -w @agentic/skill-agents && npm run build -w @agentic/skill-agents && npm run typecheck -w @agentic/server && npm run typecheck -w @agentic/jsbridge && npm run typecheck -w @agentic/ui && npm run typecheck -w @agentic/example
